creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Feb 14 07:47:43 2013
New Revision: 312201
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312201

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.4
  - Reset maintainership
  
  PR:		175894
  Submitted by:	previous maintainer

Modified:
  head/audio/jmusic/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/jmusic/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/audio/jmusic/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/jmusic/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 07:46:57 2013	(r312200)
+++ head/audio/jmusic/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 07:47:43 2013	(r312201)
@@ -2,19 +2,19 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	jmusic
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.4
 CATEGORIES=	audio java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/jMusic_Stable/${PORTVERSION} \
-		SF/${PORTNAME}/jMusic_Instruments/${PORTVERSION:S/.3//}/:instruments \
+		SF/${PORTNAME}/jMusic_Instruments/${PORTVERSION:S/.4//}/:instruments \
 		SF/${PORTNAME}/jMusic_Docs/${PORTVERSION}/:docs
 DISTFILES=	jMusic${PORTVERSION}.jar \
 		jMusic_1.6_inst.zip:instruments \
-		jMusic_doc_1.6.3.zip:docs
+		jMusic_doc_${PORTVERSION}.zip:docs
 DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 EXTRACT_ONLY=	jMusic_1.6_inst.zip \
-		jMusic_doc_1.6.3.zip
+		jMusic_doc_${PORTVERSION}.zip
 
-MAINTAINER=	nemysis@gmx.ch
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Composition in Java
 
 USE_JAVA=	yes

Modified: head/audio/jmusic/distinfo
==============================================================================

 SHA256 (jmusic/jMusic_1.6_inst.zip) = 269a82691125c498df87f1c8bc2c5885bafd1a165cb494b3984fb0ea8201ffef
 SIZE (jmusic/jMusic_1.6_inst.zip) = 72126
